Short CV

Cansu Özbay graduated with Honors from Yeditepe University, Department of Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation (English). She completed her Master’s degree in Neuroscience (English) at Üsküdar University as the first graduate of the program. She is currently pursuing her PhD in Neuroscience at Üsküdar University. She has advanced proficiency in English and holds multiple certifications in areas such as Manual Therapy, Mobilization, and Kinesiology.  Cansu Özbay is currently working as an Instructor in the Department of Physiotherapy, Vocational School of Health Services, Üsküdar University.
